zh.name: jiukun
zh.role: 独立设计师 / 开发者
zh.about: 专注于设计与开发的交叉领域，热衷于用简洁的技术方案解决实际问题。相信好的产品来自对细节的持续关注。

projects.name: 装备足迹（GearTrack）
projects.desc: 出发前总忘带东西？用装备足迹管理你的户外装备库，清单模板一键打包，行程装备不再遗漏。

en.name: jiukun
en.about: Focused on the intersection of design and development. Passionate about solving real problems with simple, elegant solutions.

projects.name: GearTrack
projects.desc: Always forgetting something before you set off? Use GearTrack to manage your outdoor gear library—checklist templates pack with one click, so you never miss any gear for your trip.
